name: C-5 --enforce exits two when verifier-output pr_sha does not match the --pr-sha gate argument
command: printf '{"pr_sha":"wrong-sha","verdict":"concur"}' > v.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/sod-gate.sh" --enforce --pr-sha abc123 --verifier-output v.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'pr_sha mismatch' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
